zh.lifeSummary: 當Rey Pedro III de Aragón於1240年8月7日出生在西班牙可蒙尼達 瓦倫希亞納瓦倫西亞瓦利納希亞時，他的父親King Jacme de Aragón I32歲，母親Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán26歲。他於1262年6月13日與Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1285年11月2日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿維拉福朗卡 德爾 培內斯享年45歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納艾華姆希亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rey Pedro III de Aragón于1240年8月7日出生在西班牙可蒙尼達 瓦倫希亞納瓦倫西亞瓦利納希亞时，他的父亲King Jacme de Aragón I32岁，母亲Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán26岁。他于1262年6月13日与Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1285年11月2日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿維拉福朗卡 德爾 培內斯享年45岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納艾華姆希亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aragón
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Ruben, Fernando, Jesus, Julio, Luis, Raul, Mario, Alfonso.

Spanish (Aragón) and southern French: habitational name from Aragon, Spain, which was an independent kingdom from 1035 to 1479. It took its name from the river Aragón, which arises in its northwestern corner. The river name may be related to Basque (h)ara(n) ‘valley’; in Basque, Aragon is called Aragoa or Aragoi, which probably means ‘high valley’. Compare Deragon .

variants.name: Deragon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Pierre, Raoul, Rejean.

French: variant of Daragon, habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, denoting someone from Aragon, a region and medieval kingdom in Spain (see Aragon ), or a habitational name for someone from Aragon, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Deragon is very rare in France. Compare Dragon .

variants.name: Aragones
meanings: Spanish (Aragonés): habitational or ethnic name for someone from Aragon (see Aragon ).

variants.name: Aragona
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Ciro, Domenic, Domenico, Gaspare.  Spanish Carolina, Ninfa, Rosario.

Italian (mainly southern): habitational or ethnic name for someone from the former kingdom of Aragon (see   Aragon  ); the surname arrived in Italy in the wake of the Aragonese conquest and domination of southern Italy, which began in 1282.

nameMeanings.name: Pedro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Rey Pedro III de Aragón was born on 7 August 1240, in Valencia, Valencia, Valencian Community, Spain, his father, King Jacme de Aragón I, was 32 and his mother, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, was 26. He married Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón on 13 June 1262, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 November 1285, in Vilafranca del Penedès, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 45, and was buried in Aiguamúrcia, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rey Pedro III de Aragón est né le 7 août 1240, à València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Espagne, son père, King Jacme de Aragón I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón le 13 juin 1262, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 novembre 1285, à Vilafranca del Penedès, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Aiguamúrcia, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.Villafranca del Panadés, Barcelona, Cata: Vilafranca del Penedès, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Rey Pedro III de Aragón am 7. August 1240 in València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Jacme de Aragón I 32 und seine Mutter Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán 26. Er hat am 13. Juni 1262 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. November 1285 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Vilafranca del Penedès, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Aiguamúrcia, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Pedro III de Aragón è nato il il 7 agosto 1240 nel València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spagna, il suo padre, King Jacme de Aragón I, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón il 13 giugno 1262, nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 novembre 1285, nel Vilafranca del Penedès, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Aiguamúrcia, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Rey Pedro III de Aragónが1240年8月7日にスペインコムニダド ベレンシアナベレンシアヴァルeンシアで生まれた時，父King Jacme de Aragón Iは32歳，母Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolánは26歳であった。1262年6月13日にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールでConstance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragónと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1285年11月2日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナヴィラフランカ デル ペンエドeスで45歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアターラゴナエイグアムuルシアにて埋葬された。

ko.Villafranca del Panadés, Barcelona, Cata: 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 빌라프랭카 데 펜드e스
ko.lifeSummary: Rey Pedro III de Aragón(이)가 1240년 8월 7일 스페인 코먼이다드 발샤나 발샤 발e샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Jacme de Aragón I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1262년 6월 13일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1285년 11월 2일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 빌라프랭카 데 펜드e스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 터아라곤아 아익아u르샤에 묻혔다.

pt.07.08.1240–2 November 1285: 7 de agosto de 1240–2 de novembro de 1285
pt.Villafranca del Panadés, Barcelona, Cata: Vilafranca del Penedès, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Pedro III de Aragón nasceu em 7 de agosto de 1240, em València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Espanha, seu pai, King Jacme de Aragón I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón em 13 de junho de 1262, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1285, em Vilafranca del Penedès, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Aiguamúrcia, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.Villafranca del Panadés, Barcelona, Cata: вилафрэнка дель пинедeс, барселона, каталуня, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rey Pedro III de Aragón родился 7 августа 1240 г. в местности валeнся, веиленся, комунидад веиленсяна, Испания, его отцу по имени King Jacme de Aragón I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón 13 июня 1262 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 ноября 1285 г. в местности вилафрэнка дель пинедeс, барселона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности эигуамuрся, таррагона, каталуня, Испания.

es.Villafranca del Panadés, Barcelona, Cata: Villafranca del Panadés, Barcelona, Cataluña, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rey Pedro III de Aragón nació el 7 de agosto de 1240, en Valencia, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, España, su papá, King Jacme de Aragón I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón el 13 de junio de 1262, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1285, en Villafranca del Panadés, Barcelona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Aiguamúrcia, Tarragona, Cataluña, España.
